2163250.name: Small Cell
2163250.description:
Play as a newly born Small Cell trying to understand the purpose of its existence in an environment populated by many other cells and many secrets.



  • A single-player adventure in search of the meaning of life and the understanding of difference
  • A well-thought-out level design with varied and challenging mechanics that require both skill and reflection
  • A small world, small in terms of the cells that live in it, but large in terms of its many levels 100+
  • A lot of bonuses to collect in order to unlock new powers, hidden areas,...

Jump, air-dash, mix cells.

With simple and really enjoyable controls, but with increasing difficulty, death will be a learning experience. In this cellular environment, use the multiple capabilities of the Small Cell to progress and advance through the adventure.



Additional challenges for the most adventurous players are available once Hard Modes are unlocked.
